title: Jira
subtitle: Issue tracking and agile project management by Atlassian
comments: Supports both Jira Cloud (.atlassian.net) and Jira Server/Data Center. Cloud uses basic auth (email + API token), Server uses bearer PAT. The /rest/api/2/search and /rest/api/3/search endpoints are deprecated on Cloud (return HTTP 410) and are blocked by provider overrides.
authNotes: Cloud: use your email + API token (generate at https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens). Server/Data Center: use a Personal Access Token as bearer auth.

providerOverrides.reason: Deprecated search endpoints return HTTP 410 on Jira Cloud

blockedOperations.reason: Deprecated on Cloud, returns 410. Use /rest/api/2/search/jql instead.
Deprecated on Cloud, returns 410. Use /rest/api/2/search/jql instead.
Deprecated on Cloud, returns 410. Use /rest/api/3/search/jql instead.
Deprecated on Cloud, returns 410. Use /rest/api/3/search/jql instead.
